testcase.name: runScenario
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //p[text()='Profile updated successfully. Please re-login to see changes.'] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '23.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.103, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\rams9\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52300}, goog:processID: 25392, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52300/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.103, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: bce7ab3b00e2be77ec21befa1ae7f967 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at StepDefinition.AllSteps.user_should_be_able_to_view_profile_updated_successfully(AllSteps.java:490) at ✽.User should be able to view profile updated successfully(file:///C:/Users/rams9/eclipse-workspace/Cielo365Project/./Feature/Feature.feature:149)
